title: Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods
use_when: Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods. Use when the user needs a product workflow for ideation & creativity related to creative solution generation from de bono's lateral thinking methods. Trigger terms: ideation, creativity, lateral-thinking, de-bono, problem-solving, product-management.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action
framework_fit: Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods fits Discovery work in the Think lifecycle when the user needs Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action without tying recommendations to the user's Think stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods as generic Discovery advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Creative solution generation from De Bono's lateral thinking methods when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.
